RAMSLAB Research on Advanced Mechanical Systems

Research archive, projects, people, publications, and laboratory updates.

ProjectsPeoplePublicationsNewsConsortiumAbout
University of Pavia
Laboratory
Research on Advanced Mechanical Systems. Static Astro archive with structured content collections.

RAMSLAB is a research laboratory at the University of Pavia focused on measurements, systems, computer vision, robotics, and digitally mediated observation.

This rebuild is intentionally structured as an editorial archive. Projects, publications, people, and institutional information are presented through lists, detail pages, and reusable content entries rather than a promotional landing page.

The current material remains placeholder content. The purpose of this phase is to validate information architecture, layout rhythm, and hierarchy before the final RAMSLAB archive is migrated.
